---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new notebook, module, or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A brief one-line description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you'd like to see added.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context
- Related notebooks or modules:
- References (papers, blog posts, implementations):
- Estimated complexity: (small / medium / large)
